transcript.text:
[Suyuk Master Chef]
[No mercy with the portions]
[Beef bone soup]
[Tendon soup]
[3 Platters of Suyuk] (Suyuk = Boiled Pork Slices)
[Suyuk Killer]
All done
Hello everyone
I'm here at Gimpo today
I came here before for a different TV show
Hello, this is mukbang creator Tzuyang
I enjoyed Suyuk very much here
So I'm back here again
[Du Son Jin Gom Tang located in Gimpo]
Hello
Welcome

Here's my autograph
It's already been 2 years
Hello
It's been a while How have you been?
You've gotten even more pretty Really?
You've gotten younger Thank you
What would you like to order?
3 medium Suyuk platters, please
You ate a lot last time too
I'll bring it right up Thank you
Thank you The side dishes are in the pots
Cubed radish kimchi looks so good
It looks delicious
Tasty
[Don't be impressed too soon]
It's been a while

Looks good
Over here, please
I can heat them 1 by 1, right?
Make sure to do this to keep the meat warm and juicy
I already know I remember
You do, right?
Suyuk tend to get dry really quickly
But this method will keep it juicy and fresh
Looks good Let's try some soup
Would you like a different broth?
Aren't they the same thing? No
Then I'll take the beef bone soup too
Bon appetit
A big piece to start off
Dip it
Very chewy

Pour some soup over it
[Also with some noodles]
[Beef bone soup]
That was so fast Thank you
That's big
Looks delicious
Dip it
Thank you for the ssamjamg (Soybean chili seasoning paste)
No garlic? It's okay
[She wants to make sure Tzuyang is taken care of]
That just melted in my mouth
I chewed like 2 times and it's gone
My favorite piece with lots of fat
Watching you eat makes me happy Really?
Thank you
I'm happy as well

Tendon this time
So chewy
This is beef tongue it seems like
[Cut]
You can tell that it's a tongue
But it tastes good
So tender
Unbelievable
With some salt as well
It melts in my mouth
What is that?
I'm not sure what it is There are a lot of different parts with different textures
Hot
It seems like you need more sauce
Thank you
Thank you

[She knows her too well]
Dip in the sauce
This should go well with scallions
Put a piece of cube radish kimchi on top
Beef bone soup
With noodles
Some salt
They specialize in this dish
The soup is...
The soup is very thick and savory
It's even better than the slices
Put some ssamjang on top
Onion too
This time...
I don't really eat non-fermented kimchi
This is it

You're supposed to eat it with this
Put it on top It's so good like this
The soup is really good
Get some noodles
Kimchi is so good too
A really fatty piece which I love
Let's take it all
2 pieces this time
With some ssamjang
The pieces are very thick
Do you see this?
It's hard to eat it in 1 bite
[Proceeds to eat it in 1 bite]
Put this here
Let's take the next platter
How though?

How did you know? Thank you
You finished that in 10 minutes
What? 10 minutes?
I was eating slowly though
Probably because the food is so good
[Bath]
Some kimchi
So chewy
It's steaming hot Looks so good
This looks like Pyeonyuk (Boiled and pressed meat)
[With some radish kimchi]
Tasty
Look at the tendons
Tendon love
Oh no!
[Dive]

That's a way
Dipping it is amazing
Just like this
So soft and chewy
This one too
On top
Amazing, right?
Tender
Meat with texture like this can also get tender by dipping in the soup
Satisfied
Satisfied? Thank you
Just looking at this makes me happy
My taste buds are a bit more like old men's
I love foods like tendon
Not a lot of people my age enjoy it
But I love tendon

The feeling of lips getting stick
This kimchi is so good
And I don't even like kimchi
[This is not a shabu-shabu mukbang]
[She needs more coke]
Oh, thank you
Why did you secretly drop it off?
[2nd platter cleared]
Thank you ma'am
That one was 15 minutes Oh, the 2nd platter?
Last one
Dip it
Chives on top
Is it chives or green onion? I don't know my vegetables
That's so good
[She's good at eating veggies now]

Tendons are very yummy
Soup and rice is a must
Thank you
She is so generous
Some radish kimchi
So good
This looks like the tail Is this an ox tail?
Let's take it all
1 more kimchi, even if it's spicy
Looks like the tail
Nevermind It wasn't
We got very busy after you came by for that TV show
At the time?
Because you ate it so well
It's because the food is good
We both did a great job

Last bite
[Perfect]
That was good
Are you done? Yes
That was 50 minutes
Total?
You timed it?
Just for fun
I came very abruptly today The meal was great
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
